reasoning: The Polymarket estimated probability for this event was 4% on Oct 30, 2025, when the price of Bitcoin was hovering between $108k and $114k. As of the knowledge cutoff date (Nov 9, 2025), the price of Bitcoin has dropped further to ~$101.6k due to recent ETF outflows, and there are only 52 days left until the resolution cutoff at the end of December 2025. Bitcoin would need a massive 67% rally within less than two months. While strong short-term volatility is historically documented in crypto, the combination of a price decline since the 4% market estimate and shrinking runway mathematically lowers the odds to around 1-2%. Adhering to the rule that probabilities must be at least 0.05, I am setting the final forecast at 5%.
